title: Packaged Factory Reference
description: Look up the ordered packaged factory definitions shipped with @you-agent-factory/packaged-factories—canonical names, descriptions, published metadata, and unabridged sources.

indexOverview.title: Packaged factory index
indexOverview.body: Each packaged factory appears in allowlist order (goal, subagent, fusion, review, quorum, tts, deep-research). Each entry shows its canonical name, packaged description when present, published and schema metadata, a stable child link, and the complete unabridged definition source.
